Class AimComponent

java.lang.Object
lucis.lux.hff.components.AimComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.universe.world.storage.EntityStore>, Cloneable
public class AimComponent extends Object implements com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.universe.world.storage.EntityStore>
The AimComponent class represents the aiming state of an entity, such as a player. It tracks whether the entity is currently aiming down sights (ADS) or not, which can be used to modify gameplay mechanics like camera behaviour, weapon spread, or animations.

This component is typically attached to entities that can aim, such as players holding firearms. The aiming state can be toggled and queried to adjust gameplay logic accordingly.

Example use cases include:

  • Reducing weapon spread or increasing accuracy while aiming.
  • Triggering animations or visual effects when entering or exiting aim mode.

  • Field Details

    • CODEC

      public static final com.hypixel.hytale.codec.builder.BuilderCodec<AimComponent> CODEC
      The BuilderCodec for serializing and deserializing the AimComponent. This codec handles the "IsAiming" field, which stores the aiming state as a boolean.

  • Constructor Details

    • AimComponent

      public AimComponent()
      Constructs a new AimComponent with the default aiming state set to false.

    • AimComponent

      public AimComponent(boolean isAiming)
      Constructs a new AimComponent with the specified aiming state.
      Parameters:
      isAiming - The initial aiming state of the component.

  • Method Details

    • isAiming

      public boolean isAiming()
      Returns wheter the entity is currently aiming.
      Returns:
      true if the entity is aiming, false otherwise.

    • setAiming

      public void setAiming(boolean aiming)
      Sets the aiming state of the entity.
      Parameters:
      aiming - The new aiming state.

    • clone

      @NullableDecl public com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.universe.world.storage.EntityStore> clone()
      Creates and returns a copy of this component.

      clone in interface com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.universe.world.storage.EntityStore>

      A new AimComponent with the same aiming state as this component.
